metadata.source: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Process Catalog (DEC 2025.1) taxonomy
metadata.description: Universal / Microsoft entity → BPC process classification rules: entity-to-L3 lookup, L2/L3 keyword rules for the D365 CE end-to-end processes, and web-resource entity-keyword patterns. Contains only generic Microsoft entity mappings.
metadata.demoNote: Public demo copy of the product classifier: bespoke third-party vendor tokens scrubbed; extended to all 15 BPC end-to-end processes via bpc-classification-ext.json.

integrations._description: Customer-specific integrations belong in customer-config.json. This section is reserved for universal integration patterns.

entityToProcess._description: Direct entity-to-process mapping for precise L2/L3 tagging. Derived from EntityInventory.json and BPC taxonomy alignment.

entityKeywordsL2._description: L2-level process hints for more specific web resource tagging. Use entityToProcess for entity-level L3 precision.

solutionMapping._description: Customer-specific solution-to-process mappings belong in customer-config.json.

20.30.030.name: Create a case from a channel

20.40.070.name: Track additional information against a case

85.45.300.name: Nurture opportunities and finalize the sale
